top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks fall as oil creeps up; Trump to ‘finish job’ in Iran
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM liveblog. The escalation of the conflict in the Middle East has wiped out the recovery across global markets that had slowly took place over the last few weeks. The US and Iran exchanged further fire overnight, with America’s central command stating it had hit around 90 Iranian targets in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold Rebounds on Softer Dollar as Traders Weigh Rate Path
top_signals.summary: Gold advanced, reversing an earlier loss, as the dollar weakened and the market weighed a resumption of fighting in the Middle East and the Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fake Paysafe, Skrill SDKs on NPM and PyPi steal credentials
top_signals.summary: Malicious packages on the Node Package Manager (npm) and the Python Package Index (PyPI) delivered stealer malware to developers and users of Paysafe, Skrill, and Neteller payment applications. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Volkswagen CEO Blume Pushes for Deep Cost Cuts
top_signals.summary: Volkswagen AG Chief Executive Officer is trying to convince the carmaker's supervisory board about his plan for a sweeping restructuring that could ultimately eliminate as many as 100,000 jobs and close four German factories. Bloomberg's Stefan Nicola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Sony Bank gets conditional OCC approval for US trust bank to issue dollar-backed stablecoin
top_signals.summary: The trust bank subsidiary, Connectia Trust, is expected to issue and manage a dollar-backed stablecoin, pending final approval.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Rolls-Royce shares rise as Burnham pledges investment in British defence
top_signals.summary: Shares in London-listed defence firms including Rolls-Royce and Babcock rose on Thursday morning after Prime Minister-to-be Andy Burnham pledged to drive investment into Britain’s defence industry. The Makerfield MP said strengthening Britain’s defence will be his “first priority” if he enters Number 10 – as he is expected to later this month – but insisted [...]

top_signals.title: AssuranceAmerica data breach exposes records of 6.9 million drivers
top_signals.summary: American insurance company AssuranceAmerica has disclosed a data breach impacting nearly 7 million drivers after attackers gained access to its systems earlier this year.  [...]
